name: Honey-Almond Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the flour, baking powder, sugar, and salt.
2. Add the butter to the dry ingredients and cut it in until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. In a separate bowl, beat the eggs with an electric mixer. Reserve 2 tablespoons of the beaten eggs.
4. To the remaining egg mixture, add the cream and honey. Stir until combined.
5. Make a well in the flour mixture and pour in the egg mixture. Combine with minimal mixing.
6. Form the dough into a ball and place on a lightly floured surface. Pat the dough to form an even layer about 3/4 inch thick and shape it into a circle.
7. Transfer the shaped scone to a baking sheet. Cut into 8 triangles using a sharp knife.
8. Brush the top of each triangle with the reserved beaten egg.
9. Sprinkle with sugar and slivered almonds.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 450°F (232°C) for 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
